description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for TestRail platform, enabling LLMs to manage test artifacts.
name: io.github.uarlouski/testrail-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your TestRail instance (e.g. https://example.testrail.io)
environmentVariables.name: TESTRAIL_INSTANCE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Email address used to authenticate with TestRail
environmentVariables.name: TESTRAIL_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: API key for authenticating with the TestRail API
environmentVariables.name: TESTRAIL_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Allow write operations on TestRail (defaults to true)
environmentVariables.name: TESTRAIL_ALLOW_WRITE_OPERATIONS

environmentVariables.description: Allow read operations on TestRail (defaults to true)
environmentVariables.name: TESTRAIL_ALLOW_READ_OPERATIONS

environmentVariables.description: Allow delete operations on TestRail (defaults to false)
environmentVariables.name: TESTRAIL_ALLOW_DELETE_OPERATIONS
